shellCommands.command: /bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,240p' /home/user/workspace/.agents/skills/mempal-memory/SKILL.md && printf '\\n--- files ---\\n' && rg --files -g '"'!*target*'"' | head -200 && printf '\\n--- status ---\\n' && git status --short"
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,280p' src/arguments.rs && printf '\\n--- main ---\\n' && sed -n '1,260p' src/main.rs && printf '\\n--- commands mod ---\\n' && sed -n '1,220p' src/commands/mod.rs"
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,320p' src/commands/report.rs && printf '\\n--- list ---\\n' && sed -n '1,280p' src/commands/list.rs && printf '\\n--- models ---\\n' && sed -n '1,320p' src/models.rs"

/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '1,320p' src/api/mod.rs && printf '\\n--- api models ---\\n' && sed -n '1,360p' src/api/models.rs && printf '\\n--- client relevant ---\\n' && rg -n \"time_entries|entries|since|until|billable|project\" src/api src/commands src/utilities.rs"
/bin/bash -lc 'mempal search "toggl-cli invoice entry billable rounding project date filters command" --json --top-k 5'
/bin/bash -lc 'rg -n "pub enum EntryAction|async fn execute_entry_command|EntryAction::|get_time_entries_filtered" src/arguments.rs src/main.rs src/api/client.rs src/api/mod.rs'
/bin/bash -lc "rg -n \"impl Default for TimeEntry|fn is_running|duration\" src/models.rs | head -30 && sed -n '220,360p' src/models.rs && sed -n '1,120p' src/commands/report.rs"
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '12,45p' src/arguments.rs; sed -n '120,145p' src/arguments.rs; sed -n '716,740p' src/arguments.rs; sed -n '1,45p' src/commands/mod.rs; sed -n '35,75p' src/main.rs"

/bin/bash -lc "git diff -- src/arguments.rs src/commands/mod.rs src/main.rs && printf '\\n--- invoice ---\\n' && sed -n '1,180p' src/commands/invoice.rs && printf '\\n--- status ---\\n' && git status --short"
/bin/bash -lc "sed -n '120,165p' src/arguments.rs; sed -n '730,750p' src/arguments.rs; sed -n '240,265p' src/main.rs; sed -n '1,150p' src/commands/invoice.rs; git status --short"
/bin/bash -lc 'mempal search "toggl-cli invoice JSON projects total_billable_seconds snake_case empty window" --json --top-k 5'
/bin/bash -lc 'cargo fmt --check && cargo build && cargo test --no-run && cargo test --bin toggl && cargo run --quiet -- entry invoice --help'
/bin/bash -lc 'cargo fmt --check && cargo build && cargo test --no-run && cargo test --bin toggl && cargo run --quiet -- entry invoice --help'
/bin/bash -lc "nl -ba src/commands/invoice.rs | sed -n '1,75p'; nl -ba src/arguments.rs | sed -n '128,155p'; nl -ba src/main.rs | sed -n '247,257p'"
